prompt: Create a Flask app with a contact form that has name, email, and message fields. When submitted, it should show a success message. Use Flask-WTF for form validation. Deploy it in a sandbox environment.

assertions.name: form_fields
assertions.description: The contact form has name, email, and message fields

assertions.name: flask_wtf_used
assertions.description: Flask-WTF is used for form handling

assertions.name: validation_works
assertions.description: Form validation works (required fields, email format)

assertions.name: success_message
assertions.description: A success message/page appears after submission

assertions.name: sandbox_running
assertions.description: The app is running in a sandbox
